subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved companions of gentle disposition, fair countenance and sweet fragrance! His honour Haji Niyaz hath arrived in Egypt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دلجوی خوشخوی مه روی خوشبوی من جناب حاجی نیاز بوصول مصر زبان باوصاف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @call to action, @growth of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
